# NotionDatabaseSensor

Polls a Notion database via the official API. Triggers a RunRequest for each row whose `last_edited_time` is after the cursor. Token-authed.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `sensor_name` | `str` | Unique sensor name. |
| `asset_keys` | `List[str]` | Slash-separated asset keys to materialize when an event matches. |
| `database_id` | `str` | Notion database ID (UUID). |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api_key_env_var` | `str` | `"NOTION_API_KEY"` | Env var with the Notion integration token. |

### Execution

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page_size` | `int` | `50` | Rows fetched per query. |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `minimum_interval_seconds` | `int` | `60` | Minimum seconds between sensor evaluations. |
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | 'RUNNING' or 'STOPPED'. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML
```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.NotionDatabaseSensorComponent
attributes:
  sensor_name: notion_release_notes_sensor
  asset_keys: [release_notes_doc]
  database_id: "abcd1234-..."
  api_key_env_var: NOTION_API_KEY
  minimum_interval_seconds: 600
```

## Requirements

```
requests
```
